topStories.title: Trump's Strait of Hormuz blockade threat raises risks and leaves predicaments unchanged
topStories.description: The conflict is now a test of wills - Iran’s capacity to absorb strikes versus Trump’s tolerance for the war's costs.

topStories.title: Trump warns China with 50% tariffs after reports suggest Beijing is preparing to send weapons to Iran
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump on Sunday threatened to impose a 50% tariff on China if it supplies weapons to Iran. Doubling down on his threat, Trump noted that any country that will supply weapons to Tehran, will face an immediate 50% tariff

topStories.title: Turkish President Erdogan calls Netanyahu ‘Hitler’, blinded by ‘blood, hatred’; threatens to invade Israel
topStories.description: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan slammed Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and threatened to invade Israel. The development comes as high-stakes talks between the US and Iran in Islamabad failed to reach an agreement.

topStories.title: Iranian authorities remain defiant, urge supporters to stay in streets
topStories.description: Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, who led Iran's delegation in talks to end the war, said US delegation 'failed to gain trust'.

dailyNews.title: “The initiative is in the hands of Tehran, not Washington”
dailyNews.description: Defence analyst Mushahid Hussain Syed says the US-Iran conflict cannot be resolved through military force.

dailyNews.title: How shaky is the Iran-US ceasefire?
dailyNews.description: Will the Iran-US truce lead to peace, or more war?

dailyNews.title: DMK turning T.N. into top State in corruption, says BJP national president Nitin Nabin
dailyNews.description: The DMK and Congress are pushing Tamil Nadu into a state of poverty through corruption, says the BJP national president during a public meeting in Ramanathapuram Assembly constituency; he targets the ruling party in T.N. over remarks on Sanatana Dharma, alleges graft through job scams and TASMAC liquor sales

dailyNews.title: US media trapped between oligarchy and presidency
dailyNews.description: American billionaires are gobbling up more and more media outlets.

dailyNews.title: SNL cold open spoofs Melania Trump over Jeffrey Epstein remarks
dailyNews.description: Saturday Night Live has stirred controversy with a sketch mocking Melania Trump’s Epstein denial, turning her detailed statement into satire and triggering mixed reactions over comedy’s limits.

dailyNews.title: Who was Danhao Wang? Chinese scholar at University of Michigan who reportedly died after 'hostile' questioning by US
dailyNews.description: China has now called for a ‘thorough investigation’ after a postdoctoral researcher reportedly died after falling from a campus building, a day after he was questioned by US authorities. Here's all you need to know about Danhao Wang.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls Asim Munir, Shehbaz Sharif ‘extraordinary men’ for hosting US-Iran talks; says they ‘continuously thank me’
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump on Sunday lauded Pakistan leaders, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Field Marshal Asim Munir, for hosting US-Iran talks. Calling them ‘extraordinary men,’ Trump said that the two continuously thank him for stopping the India-Pakistan war last year

dailyNews.title: US weather alert today: Storm warning for California as Sierra Nevada faces heavy snow, strong winds
dailyNews.description: The National Weather Service has issued a winter storm warning for parts of central California, cautioning that snow accumulations could reach up to 14 inches in some areas, accompanied by wind gusts of up to 45 mph.

dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump says the US Navy will immediately blockade the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: What Now? Vance Leaves Iran Talks Without a Deal.
dailyNews.description: The lack of a breakthrough after 21 hours of negotiations leaves the Trump administration facing several unpalatable options.

dailyNews.title: Trump Fires Board That Oversees Presidio in San Francisco
dailyNews.description: All six board members that oversee the national historic landmark were terminated, part of the administration’s efforts to reshape the federal bureaucracy.

dailyNews.title: Cuba’s President Projects Defiance in Standoff With the U.S.
dailyNews.description: Miguel Díaz-Canel’s stance on “Meet the Press” reflected how Cuba is digging in against pressure from a Trump administration distracted by the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s War With Iran Has Weakened America
dailyNews.description: The president should at long last recognize the ineptitude of his impulsive, go-it-alone approach.

dailyNews.title: Ex-Obama advisor says Iran could target Gulf oil facilities as Trump blockade squeezes regime
dailyNews.description: Amb. Dennis Ross warns Iran may strike Saudi Arabia, UAE and Kuwait oil facilities as Trump's Strait of Hormuz blockade tightens pressure on the regime.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. will blockade Strait of Hormuz, intercept ships that paid Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump said the U.S. Navy will begin blockading ships from entering or exiting the Strait of Hormuz and intercept vessels that have paid tolls to Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. to blockade ships in Strait of Hormuz after failed peace talks
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance told reporters that "we have not reached an agreement" following face-to-face talks with Iranian leaders and Pakistani negotiators.

dailyNews.title: Warner says he'll "take a look" at Trump funding request for Iran war
dailyNews.description: Democratic Sen. Mark Warner said "I'll take a look at anything" when asked whether he would oppose additional funding for the war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: CBS News poll finds few see U.S. goals being met in Iran yet
dailyNews.description: Gas prices put pressure on pocketbooks — and President Trump's ratings — as Iran war continues.
